rationale: Thread-safety bug in poll.poll usage in connection pool; internal concurrency issue, no spec rule contradicted.
CI test failures in pool tests on pypy3; platform-specific test instability, no spec involvement.
User complaint about multiprocessing restrictions; docs/UX request, no spec involvement.
CI test failure in max_idle_time_reaper introduced by prior commit; test flakiness, no spec issue.
Command monitoring spec test failing with IndexError on pop from empty list; spec test infrastructure failure.
Internal refactor to share code between server selection and max staleness JSON test files.
SSL hostname mismatch for unix socket in test; SSL config/environment issue, not a spec nonconformance.
Test import failure on Debian due to NoneType AttributeError; environment/test setup issue.
CI test failure from signal handler interaction; platform-specific test instability.
Solaris-specific UTF-8 decode failure in test; platform quirk, no spec involvement.
BSON corpus test failures on Jython due to Jython's non-standard struct/unicode handling; platform incompatibility, not PyMongo bug.
Socket count assertion failure in test_operation_failure; internal test implementation issue.
Driver raises ValueError on IPv6 literals in multi-host URI; connection-string spec requires bracket-notation IPv6 to be parsed.
Evergreen Amazon Linux CI failure due to unittest2 download/install error; pure CI environment issue.
SSL certificate verify failure in test; TLS configuration/environment issue, not a spec nonconformance.
IPv6 SSL hostname mismatch in test on macOS/Debian/SUSE; SSL cert config issue, not a spec nonconformance.
Jython socket.socket is a function not a class; platform-specific test workaround needed.
killCursors events publish internal _CursorAddress subclass instead of plain tuple for older servers; command monitoring spec requires consistent type.
Driver sends empty writeConcern dict to mongos for user management commands, causing server error; spec forbids empty writeConcern.
Compiler warnings in time64.c with -std=c99; build issue only.
Updating SSL context to use PROTOCOL_TLS_CLIENT for Python 3.6+; library modernization, not spec related.
Implementing Extended JSON spec (DRIVERS-351) previously absent from PyMongo; driver lacked required spec behavior.
Signed/unsigned comparison compiler warning in C extension; no behavioral impact, no spec involvement.
Build warning with MinGW32 for old CPython versions; build issue only.
Driver sends writeConcern with reIndex command which doesn't support it; server returns error; fix to not send it.
Command monitoring spec test fails because MongoDB 3.5+ changed find reply structure; test needs update to tolerate new fields.
Test timeout race condition on Windows with MongoDB 2.4 sharded; EOL server version environment issue.
Pool test failure on Ubuntu 16.04 zSeries; platform-specific test instability, no spec issue.
Race condition in test_standalone_error against sharded cluster; intermittent CI failure, no spec issue.
Test failure because auth saslContinue event appears before find event; test infrastructure issue with auth interaction.
Test comparing buildinfo command results fails because MongoDB 3.5+ adds logicalTime field; test update needed.
Pool test failures on Jython 2.7 due to real parallelism; same platform-specific issue as PYTHON-1179.
Test race: server ObjectId random bytes occasionally match client process id bytes; flawed test assumption.
Intermittent test_client_disconnect failure on Windows/macOS; threading race condition in test.
DuplicateKeyError not raised in continue_on_error test; race condition in test suite.
Race condition in GridFS replica set test; intermittent CI failure due to index drop timing.
Cursors queued for background kill may not be sent before process exit; timing/implementation issue, no specific spec rule mandates synchronous kill.
Driver didn't require URI percent-encoding of RFC 3986 delimiters in username/password; connection-string spec and SPEC-886 require this.
Idle time calculation uses checkout time instead of check-in time; internal implementation improvement, no spec rule.
RawBSONDocument instantiation performance issue with CodecOptions copying; internal optimization.
Use nameOnly:true in listDatabases for performance; optimization improvement, no spec nonconformance.
Race condition in test_interrupt_signal with gevent; gevent-specific threading test instability.
Undocumented behavior change in index_information between pymongo2 and pymongo3; documentation request.
validate_read_preference_mode returns internal numeric value instead of valid string; URI parser produces non-reusable readPreference option.
Extended JSON loads does not decode $binary type 0 back to bytes in Python 3; violates Extended JSON spec round-trip requirement.
Change socketKeepAlive default to True per DRIVERS-383; connection behavior change, no spec defines this default.
Adding username/password constructor arguments to MongoClient; new API ergonomics feature, not spec-driven.
Fix __slots__ usage in various internal classes for memory efficiency; internal Python optimization.
BSON C extension uses signed long for Timestamp fields, overflows on values > 2^31-1; BSON corpus test fails; spec requires full 32-bit unsigned range.
ServerSelectionTimeoutError after upgrade due to OS-level socket protocol option unavailability; environment/OS compatibility issue.
